rationale: Positive in evaluation context -- customers mention platform when praising capability
Strong positive -- amplified over VADER default to match domain enthusiasm level
Strongly positive in enterprise context -- platform flexibility is high-value attribute
Strongly negative -- customers rarely mention licensing unless complaining
Strongly negative -- direct expression of cost dissatisfaction
Strongly negative -- pricing mentions in NPS feedback are almost always complaints
Negative -- cost references in feedback context signal dissatisfaction
Negative -- signals ongoing problems rather than neutral discussion
Mildly negative -- usually appears as "should be better" or "could be better"
Negative -- appears as "needs to improve" not as "has improved"
